raw: This coupon code gives a 50% discount for the 202 Boston Harbor Ferry season for the following islands and dates: Georges Island May 15- June 15: Thursdays through Sundays June 16- September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island June 15 - September 7: every day but Tuesdays September 10- October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
